parameters.content:
## Nexa Master Performance Workflow

**8-step intelligence loop** - runs daily 07:00 Riyadh (04:00 UTC)

- All ad accounts per channel
- Claude Haiku data guard
- BQ ? HubSpot reconciliation (<2% delta)
- growth-analyst ? performance-lead ? ai-orchestrator
- Approval gate: #approvals channel

**Phase 1** - Collect from all accounts
Meta�2, Snap�2, TikTok�2, Google�2, MS�2, LinkedIn�1, HubSpot

**Phase 2** - Data guard (Claude Haiku) ? BQ MERGE
BQ ? HubSpot reconciliation (7-day, <2% delta)

**Phase 4** - #approvals digest + Asana tasks
Step 6 MONITOR + Step 8 FORECAST

parameters.sqlQuery:
{{ `
SELECT channel, COUNT(*) AS already_loaded
FROM \`${$vars.BQ_PROJECT}.${$vars.BQ_DATASET}.campaigns_daily\`
WHERE date = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY channel
` }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model:'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens:1000, system:$json.system, messages:$json.messages, tools:$json.tools, tool_choice:{type:'any'} }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel:$vars.SLACK_CHANNEL_NOTIFY, text:`:rotating_light: *Daily ETL Guard FAILED - ${$('Set Dates').first().json.yesterday}*\nReason: ${$('Parse Guard').first().json.reason}\nFlags: ${($('Parse Guard').first().json.flags||[]).join(', ')}` }) }}

parameters.sqlQuery: {{ $json.sql }}

{{ `
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%meta%'       THEN 'meta'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%google%'     THEN 'google_ads'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%snapchat%'   THEN 'snapchat'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%tiktok%'     THEN 'tiktok'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%linkedin%'   THEN 'linkedin'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%microsoft%'  THEN 'microsoft_ads'
    ELSE 'other'
  END AS channel,
  SUM(leads_total) AS bq_leads
FROM \`${$vars.BQ_PROJECT}.${$vars.BQ_DATASET}.hubspot_leads_module_daily\`
WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY channel
ORDER BY bq_leads DESC
` }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups:[{ filters:[{ propertyName:'createdate', operator:'GTE', value:String(new Date($('Set Dates').first().json.start_7d).getTime()) }]}], properties:['email','createdate'], limit:200 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel:$vars.SLACK_CHANNEL_NOTIFY, text:`:warning: *BQ?HubSpot reconciliation gap - ${$('Set Dates').first().json.yesterday}*\n${$('Reconcile BQ vs HS').first().json.alert_msg}\nBQ: ${$('Reconcile BQ vs HS').first().json.bq_total} leads | HubSpot: ${$('Reconcile BQ vs HS').first().json.hs_total} leads` }) }}

parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH hs AS (
  SELECT date, lead_utm_campaign,
         SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
         SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls,
         SUM(leads_disqualified) AS disq
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.hubspot_leads_module_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY date, lead_utm_campaign
),
spend AS (
  SELECT channel, campaign_name, LOWER(campaign_name) AS campaign_key,
         SUM(spend) AS spend
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.campaigns_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY channel, campaign_name
)
SELECT
  s.channel, s.campaign_name, s.spend,
  SUM(hs.leads) AS leads_total,
  SUM(hs.sqls) AS leads_qualified,
  SUM(hs.disq) AS leads_disqualified,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(hs.sqls), SUM(hs.leads)) AS qual_rate,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(hs.disq), SUM(hs.leads)) AS disq_rate,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(s.spend, SUM(hs.sqls)) AS cpql
FROM spend s
LEFT JOIN hs ON LOWER(hs.lead_utm_campaign) = s.campaign_key
GROUP BY s.channel, s.campaign_name, s.spend
ORDER BY s.spend DESC

WITH hs AS (
  SELECT date, lead_utm_campaign,
         SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
         SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.hubspot_leads_module_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY date, lead_utm_campaign
),
spend AS (
  SELECT channel, campaign_name, LOWER(campaign_name) AS campaign_key,
         date, SUM(spend) AS spend
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.campaigns_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY channel, campaign_name, date
),
joined AS (
  SELECT s.channel, s.date,
    CASE
      WHEN s.date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 8 DAY) THEN 'A_prior'
      WHEN s.date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 'B_this'
    END AS period,
    s.spend, hs.leads, hs.sqls
  FROM spend s
  LEFT JOIN hs ON s.date = hs.date AND LOWER(hs.lead_utm_campaign) = s.campaign_key
)
SELECT channel, period,
  ROUND(SUM(spend),0) AS spend,
  SUM(leads) AS leads,
  SUM(sqls) AS sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(spend),NULLIF(SUM(sqls),0)),2) AS cpql
FROM joined WHERE period IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY channel, period ORDER BY channel, period

WITH hs AS (
  SELECT date, lead_utm_campaign,
         SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
         SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls,
         SUM(leads_disqualified) AS disq
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.hubspot_leads_module_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY date, lead_utm_campaign
),
spend AS (
  SELECT channel, campaign_name, LOWER(campaign_name) AS campaign_key,
         SUM(spend) AS spend, MIN(date) AS first_date
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.campaigns_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY channel, campaign_name
)
SELECT s.channel, s.campaign_name,
  ROUND(s.spend,0) AS spend_14d,
  SUM(hs.leads) AS hs_leads,
  SUM(hs.sqls) AS sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(hs.disq),NULLIF(SUM(hs.leads),0))*100,1) AS disq_pct,
  DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), s.first_date, DAY) AS days_active,
  CASE
    WHEN s.spend > 70 AND SUM(hs.leads) = 0 AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), s.first_date, DAY) >= 7 THEN 'PAUSE_ZERO_CONV'
    WHEN SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(hs.disq),NULLIF(SUM(hs.leads),0)) >= 0.60 AND SUM(hs.leads) >= 5 AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), s.first_date, DAY) >= 10 THEN 'PAUSE_JUNK'
    WHEN SAFE_DIVIDE(s.spend,NULLIF(SUM(hs.leads),0)) > 50 AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), s.first_date, DAY) >= 10 THEN 'PAUSE_HIGH_CPL'
    WHEN ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(s.spend,NULLIF(SUM(hs.sqls),0)),2) < 85 AND SUM(hs.sqls) >= 2 THEN 'SCALE'
    ELSE 'WATCH'
  END AS recommendation
FROM spend s
LEFT JOIN hs ON LOWER(hs.lead_utm_campaign) = s.campaign_key
GROUP BY s.channel, s.campaign_name, s.spend, s.first_date
HAVING s.spend > 5
ORDER BY spend_14d DESC LIMIT 60

{{ `
SELECT action_type, target_name, target_id, channel, event_date, outcome,
  DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), event_date, DAY) AS days_since
FROM \`${$vars.BQ_PROJECT}.${$vars.BQ_DATASET}.agent_activity_log\`
WHERE action_type IN ('pause','scale','create')
  AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), event_date, DAY) IN (7,14)
  AND (outcome IS NULL OR outcome = '')
ORDER BY event_date DESC LIMIT 20
` }}

WITH hs AS (
  SELECT date, lead_utm_campaign,
         SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
         SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.hubspot_leads_module_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
  GROUP BY date, lead_utm_campaign
),
spend AS (
  SELECT channel, campaign_name, LOWER(campaign_name) AS campaign_key,
         SUM(spend) AS spend
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.campaigns_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
  GROUP BY channel, campaign_name
)
SELECT s.channel,
  ROUND(SUM(s.spend)/7*30,0) AS proj_spend,
  ROUND(SUM(hs.leads)/7*30,0) AS proj_leads,
  ROUND(SUM(hs.sqls)/7*30,0) AS proj_sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(s.spend),NULLIF(SUM(hs.sqls),0)),2) AS cpql_7d
FROM spend s
LEFT JOIN hs ON LOWER(hs.lead_utm_campaign) = s.campaign_key
GROUP BY s.channel ORDER BY proj_spend DESC

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model:'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens:4000, system:$json.system, messages:$json.messages, tools:$json.tools, tool_choice:{type:'any'} }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model:'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens:6000, system:$json.system, messages:$json.messages, tools:$json.tools, tool_choice:{type:'any'} }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel:$vars.SLACK_CHANNEL_NOTIFY, text:$json.digest, unfurl_links:false }) }}

WITH hs AS (
  SELECT date, lead_utm_campaign,
         SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
         SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls,
         SUM(leads_disqualified) AS disq
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.hubspot_leads_module_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY date, lead_utm_campaign
),
spend AS (
  SELECT channel, campaign_name, LOWER(campaign_name) AS campaign_key,
         SUM(spend) AS spend
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.campaigns_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY channel, campaign_name
)
SELECT
  s.channel, s.campaign_name, s.spend,
  SUM(hs.leads) AS leads_total,
  SUM(hs.sqls) AS leads_qualified,
  SUM(hs.disq) AS leads_disqualified,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(hs.sqls), SUM(hs.leads)) AS qual_rate,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(hs.disq), SUM(hs.leads)) AS disq_rate,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(s.spend, SUM(hs.sqls)) AS cpql
FROM spend s
LEFT JOIN hs ON LOWER(hs.lead_utm_campaign) = s.campaign_key
GROUP BY s.channel, s.campaign_name, s.spend
ORDER BY s.spend DESC

  SELECT date, lead_utm_campaign,
         SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
         SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.hubspot_leads_module_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY date, lead_utm_campaign

         date, SUM(spend) AS spend
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.campaigns_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY channel, campaign_name, date
),
joined AS (
  SELECT s.channel, s.date,
    CASE
      WHEN s.date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 8 DAY) THEN 'A_prior'
      WHEN s.date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 'B_this'
    END AS period,
    s.spend, hs.leads, hs.sqls
  FROM spend s
  LEFT JOIN hs ON s.date = hs.date AND LOWER(hs.lead_utm_campaign) = s.campaign_key
)
SELECT channel, period,
  ROUND(SUM(spend),0) AS spend,
  SUM(leads) AS leads,
  SUM(sqls) AS sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(spend),NULLIF(SUM(sqls),0)),2) AS cpql
FROM joined WHERE period IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY channel, period ORDER BY channel, period

WITH hs AS (
  SELECT date, lead_utm_campaign,
         SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
         SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls,
         SUM(leads_disqualified) AS disq
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.hubspot_leads_module_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY date, lead_utm_campaign
),
spend AS (
  SELECT channel, campaign_name, LOWER(campaign_name) AS campaign_key,
         SUM(spend) AS spend, MIN(date) AS first_date
  FROM \ngular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.campaigns_daily\n  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY channel, campaign_name
)
SELECT s.channel, s.campaign_name,
  ROUND(s.spend,0) AS spend_14d,
  SUM(hs.leads) AS hs_leads,
  SUM(hs.sqls) AS sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(hs.disq),NULLIF(SUM(hs.leads),0))*100,1) AS disq_pct,
  DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), s.first_date, DAY) AS days_active,
  CASE
    WHEN s.spend > 70 AND SUM(hs.leads) = 0 AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), s.first_date, DAY) >= 7 THEN 'PAUSE_ZERO_CONV'
    WHEN SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(hs.disq),NULLIF(SUM(hs.leads),0)) >= 0.60 AND SUM(hs.leads) >= 5 AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), s.first_date, DAY) >= 10 THEN 'PAUSE_JUNK'

    WHEN ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(s.spend,NULLIF(SUM(hs.sqls),0)),2) < 85 AND SUM(hs.sqls) >= 2 THEN 'SCALE'
    ELSE 'WATCH'
  END AS recommendation
FROM spend s
LEFT JOIN hs ON LOWER(hs.lead_utm_campaign) = s.campaign_key
GROUP BY s.channel, s.campaign_name, s.spend, s.first_date
HAVING s.spend > 5
ORDER BY spend_14d DESC LIMIT 60

parameters.sqlQuery: SELECT key, value FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.agent_config`
